claim_audit_results.claim_summary: PATH-EI-04 (inferred from destination) strengthens EU strategic autonomy; D4-01 (M18) supports ≥1 standardisation submission to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 42 or IEEE with EU AI Act alignment
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier2b_topic_and_call_sources/extracted/expected_impacts.json:EI-04 (status=Inferred, inference_note: 'inferred from topic destination placement'); docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase5_impact_architecture/impact_architecture.json:PATH-EI-04 (coverage_note confirms inferred); docs/tier3_project_instantiation/architecture_inputs/impacts.json:IMP-6.indicators (≥1 standardisation submission). Derivation: EI-04 is not an explicit expected impact but is inferred from the call destination 'Achieving open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies'; the pathway maps IMP-1 and IMP-6 to this inferred impact.
